title: pyrrosia porosa
intro: Pyrrosia porosa, also known as Porous Pyrrosia or Porous Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, Pyrrosia porosa has been used in Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia porosa include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and treating various infectious diseases. In herbal preparations, Pyrrosia porosa is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
